subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! Hearken with the ear of thine inborn nature unto the Voice of the Wronged One, and hold thou fast unto the mighty cord of God. The world is evanescent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیمان ندای مظلوم را باذن فطرت بشنو و بحبل متین الهی تمسک نما عالم فانی و
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
